# Extracao: Module1

- **Fonte:** Module1.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

﻿MODULE 1 LAUNCH FOUNDATION

This is about some of the core elements that make Product Launch Formula so powerful. By the end of this module, you’ll understand the 5 core types of launches (and when to use them), the Sideways Sales Letter, as well as how to use sequences, stories, positioning, and mental triggers to create a great launch.

1 Introduction [4 minutes]
Introduction to Module 1: Your Launch Foundation. This lesson will introduce you to the core strategies of Product Launch Formula.
	 
2 Intro to Product Launch Formula [14 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn how Product Launch Formula was developed and how it’s different than traditional marketing.
	
3 Five Types of Launches [10 minutes]
There are 5 launches that make up PLF: the Seed Launch, the Internal Launch, the JV Launch, the Evergreen Launch, and the Quick Launch. In this lesson you'll learn what each launch is and when to use them.

4 Circle of Awesome [12 minutes]
The Circle of Awesome™ is all about building your business strategically by doing things in a certain order. In this lesson, you’ll learn how to grow your business with different types of launches, plus how to use this process over and over again for each new product you offer.

5 Sequences [11 minutes]
This lesson is about the different sequences you'll use during your launch. With the right sequences you can build your list (and build a relationship with your list), plus get partners to promote for you (which will help you quickly increase your impact and grow your revenue).

6 Sideways Sales Letter [19 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about the Sideways Sales Letter™. This is the core strategy in PLF. It’s how you turn your marketing into an event and get people excited. It's how you build authority and trust, and it's really at the heart of what makes PLF work so well.

7 Launch Conversation [10 minutes]
The launch conversation is how you get your prospects to share with you what’s going on in their head so you can create a product they'll buy. If you want to have a successful launch, you can't guess at what your prospects want. But if you ask - they'll tell you. That's what this lesson is all about.

8 Mental Triggers [17 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about mental triggers. Mental triggers are emotional reactions that are biologically wired into the brains of your prospects... and we'll cover how you can tap into those to build an incredibly powerful and compelling story.

9 The Power of Positioning [7 minutes]
This lesson is about the power of positioning. With the right positioning, you can compete on value instead of price (hint: competing on price is a recipe for disaster). Competing on value makes a huge difference in your launch, and in the growth of your business.
	
10 The Power of Story [10 minutes]
Storytelling is one of the most powerful tools you have to help draw people into your marketing. In this lesson you'll learn why it works so well, and how good stories fit into your launch.

11 Launch Story Themes [11 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about the different types of story themes, which help “humanize” your marketing and really connect with your prospects during a launch. A powerful story theme will keep people engaged, pull them into your marketing, and help them identify with you. 

12 Problem Solution Path [11 minutes]
This lesson is about something called the "P.S. Path". When you use the P.S. Path, you can really deliver massive value in your Prelaunch without giving away the farm. Plus, you communicate that value in a way that naturally leads into the sale.

13 The Alternate Path [4 minutes]
The Problem-Solution Path works for almost any type of product or offer, but not all. This lesson is all about figuring out when to use the P.S. Path, and when to use the "Alternative Path" (for those few cases where P.S. doesn't work as well).
